problem.title: LeGO-LOAM throughput and accuracy trade-off on the public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: Which LeGO-LOAM profile should stay as the current default on the public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory converted from pose_trace.csv

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.intent: Ground-aware LeGO-LOAM baseline for HDL-64E (n_scans=64, sensor height ~KITTI).
variants.note: Ground-aware feature odometry+mapping (no GT seed). n_scans=64 matches Velodyne HDL-64E layout.
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarser surf sampling and lighter odometry/mapping Ceres budgets.
variants.note: Ground-aware feature odometry+mapping (no GT seed). n_scans=64 matches Velodyne HDL-64E layout.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Finer features and deeper optimization passes.
variants.note: Ground-aware feature odometry+mapping (no GT seed). n_scans=64 matches Velodyne HDL-64E layout.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
